items.title:
broken parser
export const z = 3;
items.description: Sole P0 item in the backlog; a broken parser represents an active regression that can corrupt the autonomous loop's proposal ingestion pipeline. Although the TODO originates in a planning document, the P0 label mandates immediate triage — the assignee must trace and fix the root cause in the actual parser module before it propagates to live cycles.

items.title: add a one-sentence description of the v6.4 autonomous loop (plan → execute → test → commit → PR via `npm run autonomous:cycle`) to this README. Max 200 characters.
items.description: Highest-value, lowest-cost item in the backlog: a single atomic sentence in README.md costs ~$0.75, carries zero regression risk, and directly improves onboarding and sprint visibility for every future cycle. The 200-character constraint makes scope unambiguous and the commit fast.
